title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 425.020 - Debt adjusting — penalty
text:
425.020.  Debt adjusting — penalty. — Any person who acts or offers to act as a debt adjuster in this state other than under a debt management plan or debt settlement plan is guilty of a misdemeanor and upon conviction shall be punished as provided by law.
(L. 1963 p. 646 § 1, A.L. 2007 H.B. 329, A.L. 2011 H.B. 661)
